subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! When engaged in remembering thee, I was set ablaze with the fire of love and my heart was consumed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست روحانی بو آن ده یادکله اشتغال ایدنجه نار محبتله اشتعال ایلدم یورک یاندی
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love as fire
